page.title: Jet Ski Rental Estepona | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Jet ski rental Estepona from €149/hr. Ride the Costa del Sol on a Sea-Doo GTX from Puerto Banús. Book your session today.
data.summary: Jet ski rental in Estepona is available from Puerto Banús, with Sea-Doo GTX models for up to 3 passengers. Prices start at €149 per hour, including fuel, safety gear, and skipper guidance.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski: 3.4m, 3 pax, departs Puerto Banús.
Rental from €149 per hour; no hidden fees.
Includes fuel, life jackets, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Skipper briefing and safety instructions provided.
Ride the coast from Puerto Banús to Estepona or Cabopino.
Perfect for groups; multiple jet skis available for booking.
No licence required; suitable for beginners and experts.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Estepona?
faq.a: No, you do not need a licence. Our Sea-Doo GTX jet skis are easy to ride, and a full safety briefing is provided before you set off. A qualified skipper accompanies the group for guidance.

faq.q: How many people can ride a jet ski?
faq.a: Each Sea-Doo GTX can carry up to 3 passengers. The maximum weight is around 200 kg. Ideal for couples or small groups.

faq.q: What is the minimum age to rent a jet ski?
faq.a: You must be at least 18 years old to rent. Minors can ride as passengers with a responsible adult. No prior experience is required.

faq.q: Can I ride from Estepona to Marbella or Puerto Banús?
faq.a: Yes, your jet ski departs from Puerto Banús, and you can ride along the coast towards Estepona, Marbella, or Cabopino. The distance to Estepona is about 12 NM (22 km).

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski rental price?
faq.a: The price includes the jet ski, fuel, life jackets, insurance, and Spanish VAT (21%). A safety briefing and basic riding instruction are also provided.

faq.q: How long can I rent a jet ski for?
faq.a: Rentals are available by the hour. Minimum booking is 1 hour. Multi-hour sessions are possible for longer coastal tours.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad?
faq.a: If conditions are unsafe, we will reschedule your booking or offer a full refund. Your safety is our priority.

faq.q: Can I book multiple jet skis for a group?
faq.a: Yes, we have a fleet of Sea-Doo GTX jet skis. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange group bookings and check availability.

data.body_html:
Looking for jet ski rental Estepona? You can ride a Sea-Doo GTX from Puerto Banús along the Costa del Sol coast. Our jet skis are modern, safe, and easy to handle. No licence needed. Prices start at €149 per hour, with fuel, insurance, and safety gear included. Whether you want a quick blast or a coastal tour, we have you covered.

Why rent a jet ski in Estepona?

Estepona’s coastline offers calm waters and stunning views of La Concha mountain. Riding a jet ski here gives you freedom to explore hidden coves like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. The water temperature averages 22°C in summer. You can cover the 12 NM from Puerto Banús to Estepona in about 30 minutes. It’s a great way to see the Golden Mile from the sea.

Our jet ski: Sea-Doo GTX

We rent the Sea-Doo GTX, a 3.4-metre jet ski that seats up to 3 people. It has a top speed of around 50 knots (93 km/h), but you can ride at your own pace. The engine is fuel-efficient, and the hull is stable. All units are maintained to high standards. You get a full safety briefing before departure.

What’s included in the price?

Every rental includes:

  • Licensed jet ski (Sea-Doo GTX)
  • Fuel for the session
  • Life jackets and safety equipment
  • Insurance and Spanish IVA (21%)
  • Skipper briefing and guidance

No hidden extras. Just show up and ride.

How to book jet ski rental Estepona

Booking is easy. Contact us via WhatsApp to check availability and reserve your time slot. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, especially in July and August. You can also book as part of a larger boat charter. For example, combine a jet ski with a luxury yacht rental for a full day on the water.

Routes and destinations

From Puerto Banús, you can ride south to Estepona (12 NM), north to Cabopino (8 NM), or explore the Marbella coast. Popular stops include:

  • Cala del Faro – a quiet cove near Estepona
  • Cala Cortés – ideal for a swim stop
  • Río Verde – scenic estuary
  • Puerto Banús – start and end point

Your skipper can suggest the best route based on conditions.

Group and multi-jet ski bookings

Have a group? We can arrange multiple jet skis for simultaneous rental. Great for stag dos, birthday parties, or team outings. Contact us for a quote. We also offer combo packages with other boats from our fleet, like the Speedboat for water sports.

Safety and requirements

Safety is paramount. You must be at least 18 to drive. Passengers can be younger with an adult. No licence needed. We provide a life jacket and briefing on controls, hand signals, and local regulations. In case of bad weather, we reschedule or refund.

Frequently asked questions

Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Estepona?

No, you do not need a licence. Our Sea-Doo GTX jet skis are easy to ride, and a full safety briefing is provided before you set off. A qualified skipper accompanies the group for guidance.

How many people can ride a jet ski?

Each Sea-Doo GTX can carry up to 3 passengers. The maximum weight is around 200 kg. Ideal for couples or small groups.

What is the minimum age to rent a jet ski?

You must be at least 18 years old to rent. Minors can ride as passengers with a responsible adult. No prior experience is required.

Can I ride from Estepona to Marbella or Puerto Banús?

Yes, your jet ski departs from Puerto Banús, and you can ride along the coast towards Estepona, Marbella, or Cabopino. The distance to Estepona is about 12 NM (22 km).

What is included in the jet ski rental price?

The price includes the jet ski, fuel, life jackets, insurance, and Spanish VAT (21%). A safety briefing and basic riding instruction are also provided.

How long can I rent a jet ski for?

Rentals are available by the hour. Minimum booking is 1 hour. Multi-hour sessions are possible for longer coastal tours.

What happens if the weather is bad?

If conditions are unsafe, we will reschedule your booking or offer a full refund. Your safety is our priority.

Can I book multiple jet skis for a group?

Yes, we have a fleet of Sea-Doo GTX jet skis. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange group bookings and check availability.
